title: ageratina psilodora
intro: Ageratina psilodora, also known as 'Mexican Tea', is a plant species in the mint family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. It has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ageratina psilodora include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through distillation or solvent extraction.
